reference: Sir, I fell while playing football. I went for a check-up, and they said that there is a crack in the wrist region; I think it is the scaphoid region. They also added that the space between the bones has slightly increased, and they mentioned that it is two millimeters. Now I have a plaster of Paris, and they said that after one week we should take another X-ray and check. What can I do? Will there be any problems, or will it heal with the plaster itself?
text: Sir, I fell while playing football. I went for a checkup and they said that there is a crack in the wrist region; I think it is the scaphoid region. They also added that the space between the bones has slightly increased, and they mentioned that it is 2 mm. Now I have a plaster of Paris, and they said that after 1 week we should take another X-ray and check. What can I do? Will there be any problems, or will it heal with the plaster itself?
